    Tanti Kristanti

    [NLP, ML, DL]

    • Paris, Île-de-France, FR
    • Email
    • ORCID
    • GitHub
    • LinkedIn

    Curriculum Vitae

    Education

    • Master in Language and Computer Science, Sorbonne Université, France

      • Field of study: Arts, Humanities, Languages [Arts, Lettres, Langues]
      • Major: Literature, Philology, Linguistics [Littérature, Philologie, Linguistique]
      • Specialization: Language and Computer Science [Langue et Informatique]
      • Master 1 Thesis: Semantic annotation and ontology population based on the autism corpus [Annotation sémantique et peuplement d’ontologie à partir du corpus sur l’autisme]
      • Master 2 Thesis: Enhancement of a Named Entity Recognition and Disambiguation (NERD) system [Enrichissement d’un système de reconnaissance et de désambiguïsation d’entités nommées]

    • Master in Informatics, Bandung Institute of Technology (ITB), Indonesia

      • Field of study: Engineering
      • Major: Informatics
      • Specialization: Information Systems
      • Master Thesis: Enterprise Integration for Academic and Financial Functions

    Languages

    • French: fluent
    • English: fluent
    • Indonesian: native

    Work Experience

    • [November 2017 – April 2023]: Research and Development Engineer

      • National Institute for Research in Digital Science and Technology (INRIA), Paris, France
      • ALMAnaCH Project Team

    • [2008 – 2015]: Full-Time Lecturer

      • Faculty of Information Technology, Maranatha Christian University, Bandung Indonesia

    Technical Skills

    • Programming languages:
      • Python, Java, C, C#
    • ML/DL frameworks:
      • PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, Hugging Face
    • Databases:
      • PostgreSQL, SQL, MySQL
    • Vector databases:
      • ChromaDB, Faiss, pgvector
    • Graph Database Management System (GDMS):
      • Neo4j + Cypher (declarative language)
    • Semantic Web tools:
      • RDF (Resource Description Framework), SPARQL
    • Embedding models:
      • Sentence-transformer, embeddinggemma, qwen-embedding
    • LLMs:
      • Llama, Mistral, Deepseek, Qwen, GPT, BERT
    • RAG and Agentic AI platforms:
      • LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, smolagents
    • APIs:
      • RESTful API, FastAPI
    • API testing tools:
      • Postman, Insomnia
    • Web interfaces and applications:
      • Gradio, Streamlit, Java Spring Boot
    • Version control systems (VCS), CI/CD:
      • Git, GitHub, GitLab
    • Deployment:
      • Docker, Kubernetes (K8s)
    • Cloud platforms:
      • AWS, Azure, GCP
    • SAP R/3 modules (user level):
      • SAP system administrators (ADM100)
      • Project management functions in SAP (PLM200)
      • ABAP programming language of SAP (BC400)
      • Business concepts and methods in Management Accounting (AC040)

    Professional Certification

    • Scrum Way, the Way: Software Development Management with Scrum

    • ADM100 – SAP Web AS Administration I

    • Certified Ethical Hacker

    • BC400 – Introduction to the ABAP Workbench SAP

    • PLM200 – Business Process in Project Management SAP

    • AC040 – Business Process in Management Accounting SAP

    Academic Honor

    • Best Faculty Member (Lecturer), 07/08/2009:
      • Evaluation of Academic Performance for the Even Semester 2008/2009
      • Faculty of Information Technology, Maranatha Christian University, Bandung, Indonesia

    Research

    1. Development of Lecturer Portal Leveraging Text Classification Algorithm [Pengembangan Portal Dosen Memanfaatkan Algoritma Klasifikasi Teks]
    • Years: 2014-2015
    • Funded by: Maranatha Christian University
    1. Classification and Clustering Analysis Model for Student and Lecturer Data in Higher Education [Model Analisis Classification dan Clustering untuk Data Mahasiswa dan Dosen di Perguruan Tinggi]
    • Years: 2013-2014
    • Funded by: Competitive grant from the Directorate General of Higher Education, Research and Technology (DIKTI), Ministry of Education and Culture, Indonesia.

    Publications

    • DeLFT and entity-fishing: Tools for CLEF HIPE 2020 Shared Task

      Kristanti, Tanti, and Laurent Romary. (2020). "DeLFT and entity-fishing: Tools for CLEF HIPE 2020 Shared Task." CLEF 2020-Conference and Labs of the Evaluation Forum. Vol. 2696. CEUR.

    • Towards annotation through more complex corpora: the case of specialized language [Vers l’annotation par le jeu de corpus plus complexes : le cas de la langue de spécialité]

      Karën Fort, Bruno Guillaume, Nicolas Lefebvre, Laura Ramírez, Mathilde Regnault, Mary Collins, Oksana Gavrilova, Tanti Kristanti. (2017). "Vers l'annotation par le jeu de corpus plus complexes : le cas de la langue de spécialité." Traitement Automatique des Langues Naturelles (TALN).

    • Development of the Lecturer Portfolio Portal at the Faculty of Information Technology, Maranatha Christian University [Pengembangan Portal Portofolio Dosen pada Fakultas Teknologi Informasi Universitas Kristen Maranatha].

      Kristanti, Tanti and Ryan Christanto. (2015). "Pengembangan Portal Portofolio Dosen pada Fakultas Teknologi Informasi Universitas Kristen Maranatha." Seminar Nasional Teknik Informatika dan Sistem Informasi (SeTISI) 2015, 9th April 2015, pp. 238-243.

    • Classification Analysis Model Using J48 for Student and Lecturer Data in Higher Education [Model Analisis Classification Dengan J48 untuk Data Mahasiswa dan Dosen di Perguruan Tinggi].

      Ayub, Mewati, Tanti Kristanti, Maresha Caroline, Tjio Marvin Christian. (2014). "Model Analisis Classification Dengan J48 untuk Data Mahasiswa dan Dosen di Perguruan Tinggi."Seminar Nasional Teknologi Informasi dan Multimedia (SNASTIA), pp. 19-30. Surabaya, Indonesia.

    • Computer Laboratory Scheduling using Genetic Algorithms [Penjadwalan Penggunaan Ruangan Laboratorium Komputer Menggunakan Algoritma Genetik]

      Sanjaya, Ferry, and Tanti Kristanti. (2014). "Penjadwalan Penggunaan Ruangan Laboratorium Komputer Menggunakan Algoritma Genetik." Konferensi Nasional Teknologi Informasi dan Aplikasinya (KNTIA). Vol. 3, pp. A22-A29. Palembang, South Sumatra.

    • Staff Recruitment Management System for Computer Laboratory [Sistem Pengelolaan Rekrutmen Staf Laboratorium Komputer]

      Unamo, Christian Michael, and Tanti Kristanti. (2014). "Sistem Pengelolaan Rekrutmen Staf Laboratorium Komputer." Jurnal Sistem Informasi. Vol. 9(1), pp. 21-33.

    • Expert System for Detecting Pests and Diseases of Sweet Orange Plants in the Karo District [Sistem pakar hama dan penyakit pada tanaman jeruk manis di Kabupaten Karo]

      Kristanti, Tanti, and Theopilus Sitepu. (2013). "Sistem pakar hama dan penyakit pada tanaman jeruk manis di Kabupaten Karo." Seminar Nasional Sistem Informasi Indonesia (SESINDO). Bali, Indonesia.

    • Data warehouse as a basis for analyzing higher education academic data [Data warehouse sebagai Basis Analisis Data Akademik Perguruan Tinggi]

      Ayub, Mewati, Tanti Kristanti, and Maresha Caroline. (2013). "Data warehouse sebagai Basis Analisis Data Akademik Perguruan Tinggi." Seminar Nasional Teknologi Informasi (SNTI). Jakarta, Indonesia.

    • Implementation of the Rivest-Shamir-Adleman RSA Algorithm for Data Security of Web-Based Information Systems [Implementasi Algoritma Rivest-Shamir-Adleman RSA untuk Keamanan Data pada Sistem Informasi Berbasis Web]

      Kristanti, Tanti, and Nurul Amanda. (2013). "Implementation of the Rivest-Shamir-Adleman RSA Algorithm for Data Security of Web-Based Information Systems." Seminar Nasional Teknik Informatika dan Sistem Informasi (SeTISI) 2013. 6th April 2013, pp. 280-285.

    • Knowledge Management System of Residential Architectural Design at Penta Rekayasa [Knowledge Management System Desain Arsitektur Rumah Tinggal pada Penta Rekayasa]

      Kristanti, Tanti, and Tiara Desinta. (2013). "Knowledge Management System of Residential Architectural Design at Penta Rekayasa." Konferensi Nasional Sistem Informasi (KNSI) 2013. Lombok, Indonesia.

    • Development of a Try Out Simulation Application for SNMPTN Preparation [Pembuatan Aplikasi Try Out Simulasi Persiapan SNMPTN]

      Kristanti, Tanti, and Devriena Ocktara. (2012). "Pembuatan Aplikasi Try Out Simulasi Persiapan SNMPTN." Seminar Nasional Aplikasi Teknologi Informasi (SNATI). Yogyakarta, Indonesia.

    • Student Assessment Information System for SMPN 14 Bandung [Sistem Informasi Nilai SMPN 14 Bandung]

      Kristanti, Tanti, and Niluh Gede Redita A.K. (2012). "Sistem Informasi Nilai SMPN 14 Bandung." Jurnal Sistem Informasi. Vol. 7(1), pp. 85-94.

    • Analysis, Design, and Documentation of Fabric and Wire Processing at PT. X [Analisa, Perancangan, Dan Dokumentasi Dalam Proses Pengolahan Kain dan Kawat di PT. X]

      Kristanti, Tanti and Wenny Franciska Senjaya. (2011). "Analysis, Design, and Documentation of Fabric and Wire Processing at PT. X." Jurnal Sistem Informasi. Vol. 6 (2). pp. 155-171.

    • Implementation of a CMS Based Knowledge Management System in the Production Division of CV. Indotai Pratama Jaya [Penerapan Knowledge Management System Berbasis Website CMS pada Divisi Produksi CV. Indotai Pratama Jaya]

      Kristanti, Tanti and Niko Pamela. (2011). "Penerapan Knowledge Management System Berbasis Website CMS pada Divisi Produksi CV. Indotai Pratama Jaya." Jurnal Sistem Informasi. Vol. 6 (1). pp. 89-99.

    • Development of an Online Indonesian-Mandarin Dictionary Application [Pembuatan Aplikasi Kamus Indonesia-Mandarin/Mandarin-Indonesia Online]

      Kristanti, Tanti and Limandinata, Sianny. (2009). "Pembuatan Aplikasi Kamus Indonesia-Mandarin/Mandarin-Indonesia Online." Jurnal Informatika. Vol. 5 (2). pp. 187-201.

    • Enterprise Integration – Case Study of Education Foundation [Integrasi Enterprise – Studi Kasus Yayasan Pendidikan]

      Kristanti, Tanti. (2009). "Integrasi Enterprise – Studi Kasus Yayasan Pendidikan." Jurnal Sistem Informasi. Vol. 4 (1). pp. 17-32.

    Administrative Roles
